name: UBA : Browsed to Education Website
notes:
A user has accessed a URL which may indicate elevated security or legal risk.

References: 
   http://sitereview.bluecoat.com/categories.jsp
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : URL Category Filter

when the event matches "Web Category" ilike '%education%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%health%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%history%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%reference%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%kids%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%training%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%research%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%science and technology%' OR "Web Category" in (3, 69, 97, 118, 121, 209) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY UBA : Browsed to Education Website on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
